details.description:
Stop by The Gathering at Calvary Church for delicious brewed coffee, specialty beverages, and small bites!

Just inside Calvary's main entrance Atrium, you'll find the café — a warm and welcoming space filled with natural light. Perfect for meeting friends and enjoying conversation and community.

reviews_data.review_text:
Located inside the church, and it's very cozy.
We really liked the hot chocolate, my mom enjoyed the turkey sandwich, and I really liked the muffin.
I recommend this place for a meeting, studying, or just hanging out.

raw_data.name: The Gathering Café
raw_data.full_address: 5801 Pineville-Matthews Rd, Charlotte, NC 28226, United States
